heading: Management of newly acquired lands
label: 410aaa–74 Management of newly acquired lands
text: Any lands within the boundaries of a wilderness area designated under this Act which are acquired by the Federal Government, shall become part of the wilderness area within which they are located and shall be managed in accordance with all the provisions of this Act and other laws applicable to such wilderness area.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is defined in , which is set out as a Definitions note under .section 3 of Pub. L. 103–433section 410aaa of this title
